# Project File Organizer (Uplizd) - Automated Dropbox file structure and lifecycle management

## Summary
The Project File Organizer (Uplizd) is an intelligent automation workflow that streamlines digital asset management by automatically categorizing, renaming, and structuring files within Dropbox. By leveraging AI to interpret file content and metadata, this solution eliminates manual sorting, ensures consistent folder taxonomy, and enhances team productivity through automated file hygiene and retrieval optimization.

---
